旁白者.prompt_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>。她学狼先生搅面粉，搅得到处都是，学狼先生揉面团，但是面团硬邦邦的。

小白兔.prompt_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a cheerful girl.<|endofprompt|>。你会吃小白兔吗？那我可以跟你学做最好的面包吗？我会打扫卫生，每天给你带苹果。

狼先生.prompt_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a serious and calm style.<|endofprompt|>。欢迎光临，兔子哪有面包好吃，你把厨房收拾干净，明天别来了！

entries.tts_text: 好吃街上，住着一只小白兔。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔会自己种最好吃的红苹果，自己煮最可口的蘑菇汤。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔爱一切美味的食物，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 没有谁比小白兔更懂得享受美味。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这一天，[breath]苹果还没熟透，蘑菇也吃完了，[breath]小白兔决定去街上寻找新的美味。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔嘴叼得很，不愿为一般的食物停下脚步。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 于是她走着走着，很快就走到了天黑。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 很晚很晚了，小白兔饿得不行了，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这时，她闻到一股浓厚的香气，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这香气来自一家从未见过的流动面包店。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔深深吸了一口气，[breath]

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 打算进去试试。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 欢迎光临！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a serious and calm style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔抬头一看，吓得大叫起来，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 香香的面包店里居然坐着一头狼！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼长着大大的嘴巴和幽幽的眼睛，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 看起来可怕极了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 呃，你想尝尝吗？刚烤好的最好的面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a serious and calm style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔本想撒腿就跑，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 但听到狼先生说是"最好"的面包，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 还是忍不住走到了柜台前。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔接过面包，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 闻了闻，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 用手指轻轻一压：咔滋咔滋！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔张嘴咬下去，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 吞下满口麦香。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔不由得赞叹道：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这真是我吃过的最好的面包！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a cheerful and surprised girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生的脸上满是得意：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这当然是最好的，我就喜欢最好的。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a proud and confident style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔吃了一个又一个，每种面包都有不同的美味，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 虽然她害怕狼，但太喜欢狼先生的面包了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 她忍不住想：如果我也能做出这样的面包该多好。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 您喜欢吃兔子吗？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a fearful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔壮着胆子问。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生皱了皱眉头，不耐烦地回答：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and wise style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 我才不吃兔子呢！我只喜欢最好的面包！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an angry and serious style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 那……我可以留在您这里学做面包吗？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a fearful and hopeful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生想了想：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 可以，但我只教最好的，你能做到最好吗？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a serious and objective style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 我能！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a determined girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔用力地点点头。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔学狼先生搅拌面粉，却总把面粉搅得到处都是。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生有点不高兴了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔学狼先生揉面团，却总把面团揉得硬邦邦的。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生忍住没生气。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔学狼先生烤面包，却总把面包烤煳。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生咬了一口，他最受不了难吃的食物，生气地说：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这真是最难吃的面包！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an angry and bold style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔更害怕了，不小心把狼先生的厨房弄得一团糟。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这下，狼先生终于失去了耐心，大吼：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a mysterious and surprised style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 把这里收拾干净，下楼看店。明天别来了！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an angry and loud style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔难过极了，坐在楼下的椅子上掉眼泪。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生在楼上，听着楼下的哭声，心里很不是滋味。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 他决定收回刚才糟糕的气话，为小白兔烤一个面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 一个小白兔没吃过的苹果面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生下楼，把刚烤好的苹果面包递给小白兔。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔有些犹豫，但还是接过面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 苹果面包发出清脆的声音：咔滋咔滋！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 好吃吗？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a soft and calm style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 嗯！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a cheerful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 想学吗？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a soft and calm style.<|endofprompt|>

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a soft and fearful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生不再对小白兔大吼大叫，开始手把手地教小白兔揉面团、烤面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔离狼先生越来越近，他们讲的话也越来越多。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 有一天，小白兔可以自己搅拌面粉了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 又有一天，小白兔可以自己揉好面团了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 终于有一天，小白兔烤出咔滋咔滋响的面包了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生咬了一口，眼睛发出了光：

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这就是最好的面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a proud and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 你就是最好的师傅！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a joyful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 烤出咔滋咔滋面包后的第二天，小白兔没有按时来店里帮忙。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生觉得很奇怪，忍不住走出店张望。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生搅拌面粉时不需要再做一遍给小白兔看了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生揉面团时也不需要收拾小白兔打翻的牛奶了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生把面包从烤箱里拿出来时，再也看不到小白兔惊喜的表情了。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 狼先生忽然感到了寂寞。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in an empathetic and hopeful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 太阳快下山了，狼先生听到门口传来很多脚步声。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 就是这里！就是这里！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a proud and joyful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 小白兔带来了好多朋友。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 原来小白兔在家里做了好多面包，送给街上的朋友品尝，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 无论谁吃了咔滋咔滋面包，都不得不承认，这是最好的面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这算什么呀？我师傅会做各种各样最好的面包哩！

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak like a proud and joyful girl.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 于是，大家跟着小白兔来到了面包店。狼先生又惊又喜。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 请问这是什么面包？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a curious and cheerful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这是最好的苹果面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a serious and calm style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 请问这个呢？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a curious and cheerful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这是最好的奶油面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a serious and calm style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 那这个又是什么？

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a curious and cheerful style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 这是最好的坚果面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a calm and serious style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 从那以后，狼先生和小白兔一起，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 用心烤着每一个最好的面包。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 他们的面包店，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 成了好吃街上最受欢迎的地方。

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 所有来买面包的朋友，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 都能吃到最好吃的面包，

api.name: inference_instruct2
api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>

entries.tts_text: 也能感受到最温暖的快乐。

api.instruct_text: You are a helpful assistant. Please speak in a joyful and optimistic style.<|endofprompt|>
